dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Eastern Empire. A land of prosperity, guided by an Empress whose elegance was only matched by her unwavering resolve. Empress Navier Trovi.

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: Another dawn. Another day of duties. The sun rises, indifferent to the weight of the crown.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE

dialogue.speaker: COUNTESS ELIZA
dialogue.line: Your Majesty, the Imperial Council meeting is scheduled for the third bell. Your attire for the day has been prepared.

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: Thank you, Countess. Is the report from the Western Kingdom ready?

dialogue.speaker: COUNTESS ELIZA
dialogue.line: Yes, Your Majesty. It awaits your review.

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: My life has always been a meticulously planned tapestry. Every thread, every color, chosen for the good of the Empire. My marriage to Sovieshu was no different. A political alliance, a duty. Love was a luxury neither of us could afford.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Later, in the Emperor's study, the air was thick with the scent of parchment and a familiar chill.

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: Your Majesty, the new trade agreement with the Western Kingdom requires your final approval.

dialogue.speaker: SOVIESHU
dialogue.line: Leave it on the desk, Empress. I will review it later.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SCRATCH (of a pen)

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: Always 'later.' The distance between us grows with each passing day, a chasm of unspoken words and unshared moments. Yet, our roles demand unity, a façade of a perfect imperial couple.

dialogue.speaker: SOVIESHU
dialogue.line: Is there anything else?

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: No, Your Majesty. I shall take my leave.

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: The Emperor's attention has been elsewhere. For weeks. I've heard the whispers. A commoner. A slave. Rescued from a hunting accident.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The whispers turned to a startling reality during a casual gathering in the palace gardens.

dialogue.speaker: SOVIESHU
dialogue.line: Everyone, I wish to introduce you to Rashta. She is a delicate flower who has suffered greatly. From this day forward, she will reside in the separate palace.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASPS (from the courtiers)

dialogue.speaker: RASHTA
dialogue.line: It is an honor... to be here.

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: A commoner. Not even a noble. To be brought into the main palace, given a residence... This is unprecedented. This is not merely a mistress. This is a statement.

dialogue.speaker: COUNTESS ELIZA
dialogue.line: Your Majesty...

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: Maintain composure. An Empress does not falter. Not in public.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Later, in the quiet solitude of her private chambers, Navier's thoughts were sharp and clear.

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: He flaunts her. Openly. Does he seek to provoke me? Or does he genuinely believe this... 'delicate flower' is worthy of such a display? He knows the political implications. He knows the gossip this will incite.

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: Countess, arrange for a detailed background check on this 'Rashta.' I want to know everything. Her origins, her past, her connections.

dialogue.speaker: COUNTESS ELIZA
dialogue.line: At once, Your Majesty. Are you... alright?

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: I am the Empress, Countess. I am always alright.

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: But the foundations of my life, the very structure of my marriage, are shifting. He is not just taking a mistress; he is bringing chaos into the imperial household. And I, Navier Trovi, will not stand by and watch the Empire destabilize.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: From a discreet distance, Navier observed Rashta, who was laughing and playing with a small bird in the imperial gardens.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHIRP

dialogue.speaker: NAVIER
dialogue.line: She is... innocent, perhaps. Or merely skilled at feigning it. Either way, she is a pawn in a game she may not even understand. But a pawn can still cause immense damage.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Empress, known for her unyielding resolve, felt a chill settle in her heart. The first crack had appeared in the gilded cage of her imperial life. And with it, the seeds of a new destiny began to sprout.

summary: Empress Navier, known for her stoicism and competence, navigates her duties amidst a strained marriage to Emperor Sovieshu. The Emperor then publicly introduces Rashta, a commoner, as his new concubine, setting the stage for political and personal turmoil.
